hero.description: "Whether you're here to lend a hand or seeking a path forward, your journey starts with a smile. Together, we build a bridge of hope and transparency."

featured.description: Discover verified missions that are changing lives right now. Your kindness can create a lasting smile.
featured.no_campaigns: No featured missions at the moment

campaign.support_text: Support {{creator}}'s mission to create lasting impact in the {{category}} sector.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro_p1: Welcome to BeingSmile. By accessing our platform, you are joining a global community dedicated to healing lives through transparency and kindness. These terms govern your use of our services.
terms.donation_p1: Every donation you make is a direct contribution to a verified mission. BeingSmile ensures that funds reach the intended cause after a standard verification period to prevent fraud.
terms.responsibility_p1: Mission creators must provide accurate documentation and regular progress updates. Misrepresentation of facts or misuse of funds will result in immediate permanent suspension from the platform.
terms.transparency_p1: We keep our operations lean. A standard platform fee is applied to each transaction to cover secure payment processing and maintenance, which is always clearly stated before you donate.
terms.privacy_p1: Your data is protected by industry-grade encryption. We never sell your personal information to third parties. Verified status is required for all fundraisers to maintain high-trust levels.
